description: Example card faces exercising every S13.3 contract field (timing, cost, range/targets, required state, effect, check table, tags, discard/Exhaust, accessible text, generated-description fallback). Wire shape for components/card.js's renderCard.

cards.name: Emergency Semicolon
cards.requirements: Both allies must have an unresolved setup effect
cards.effect: Combine two weaker allied setup effects into one action.
cards.generatedDescription: You slam two half-finished plans together and hope the grammar holds.
cards.accessibleText: Emergency Semicolon: main action, adjacent self and one ally, combines two weaker allied setup effects into one. Discards on play.

cards.name: Field Suture
cards.effect: Stabilize a Downed hero or treat Bleeding.
cards.checkTable: Force vs DC 11: success stabilizes fully, failure still removes Bleeding
cards.generatedDescription: Thread, pressure, and a muttered apology.
cards.accessibleText: Field Suture: main action, adjacent Downed or Bleeding ally, Force check DC 11 to stabilize or treat Bleeding. Exhausts on play.
